features.name: reserved_c_function_name_as_signal
features.description: Code should include a signal or port declared with a C standard library function name such as free, malloc, printf, exit, or similar. This causes namespace collision when Verilator generates C++ code that calls the stdlib function with the same name as the signal.

features.name: public_signal_name_collision_cpp_namespace
features.description: Code should include public signals that expose SystemVerilog names into the C++ namespace. Public signals can collide with internal C++ functions or macros used by the Verilator runtime.

features.name: dtor_cleanup_macro_name_collision
features.description: Code should include constructs that trigger Verilator's VL_DO_DANGLING cleanup macro with C stdlib functions. The macro pattern VL_DO_DANGLING(free(const_cast<char*>(vlNamep)), vlNamep) can collide with signal names in the design.
